title: Space Race
description: Space Race is a Datapack that allows you to build your OWN rocket and explore the solar system!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73b78ab489464202770ee716cc420b1051ae4aea_0.webp)<center> 
  
[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0cf0180cbd5c4367ffae3af2f032bb768cd1a56.png)](https://discord.com/invite/eZEHeNbzUE) [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea2b7719efdde91eec7c454f534788ffc096c9e5.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@GoldenRobotII)
</center>

## About
Space Race is a Datapack that allows you to build your OWN rocket and explore the entire solar system! In it's current state you can travel to both the Moon and Mars, on which you'll be able to find new blocks and items! Various components can improve your rocket and allow for further travel.

## Overview
Watch this video for an entire explanation about the datapack:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SDx4wS8r6n8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

In Creative? Get yourself the creative supply crate with every new item! Use this command:
```
/loot give @s loot spex:block/creative_supply_crate
```


## Download
If you don't know how to download the datapack and resourcepack, follow these steps.
<details>
<summary>Add Data Pack to new world</summary>


1. Select the version you want and download the **space-race-<version>-dp.zip** file
2. Click **Create new world** in minecraft 
3. Click **More**, then **Data Packs**
4. Drag the **space-race-<version>-dp.zip** file into there, and make sure you put it on the **selected** side (right side)




</details>
<details>
<summary>Add Data Pack to existing World</summary>


1. Select the version you want and download the **space-race-<version>-dp.zip** file
2. Select your world in minecraft 
3. Click **Edit** at the bottom of the screen
4. Click **Open World Folder**
5. Click the **datapacks** folder
6. Drag the **space-race-<version>-dp.zip** file into there


</details>
<details>
<summary>Install Resource Pack</summary>


1. Select the version you want and download the **space-race-<version>-rp.zip** file
2. Click **Options** in minecraft
3. Click **Resource Packs**
4. Drag the **space-race-<version>-rp.zip** file into there, and make sure you put it on the **selected** side (right side)


</details>
